allow: PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -m ruff check shoplift_detector/ tests/ alembic/ 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -m ruff check --fix shoplift_detector/ tests/ alembic/ 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -m ruff check shoplift_detector/ tests/ alembic/ 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -m pytest -q 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -m ruff check shoplift_detector/ tests/ alembic/ 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
